summary: LDoc is a LuaDoc-compatible documentation generator which can also process C extension source. Markdown may be optionally used to render comments, as well as integrated readme documentation and pretty-printed example files.
raw_content: LDoc is a LuaDoc-compatible documentation generator which can also process C extension source. Markdown may be optionally used to render comments, as well as integrated readme documentation and pretty-printed example files.
generated_summary: ldoc is a LuaDoc-compatible documentation generator that processes C extension source, complete usually used in the fields of doc.
phase1: A Lua library for generating documentation from LuaDoc-compatible sources, including C extension source.
phase2: Supports Markdown for rendering comments and integrated readme documentation, as well as pretty-printed example files.
phase3: Generates documentation for Lua scripts and C extension modules, making it useful for developers working with Lua and C.
